from llama_index.core.utils import resolve_binary


def _buffer_with_size(buffer: BytesIO) -> Tuple[BytesIO, int]:
    """Return the buffer alongside its byte size, preserving its read position."""
    position = buffer.tell()
    size = buffer.seek(0, 2)
    buffer.seek(position)
    return buffer, size
